name: P:GTA.NaturalMotion.ShotSnapHelper.SnapBalancingMult
summary: BalancingMult*snapMag = The magnitude of the reaction if balancing = (not lying on the floor/ not upper body not collided) and not airborne.
remarks:
Default value = 1.0f.
            Min value = 0.0f.
            Max value = 20.0f.
